scope: wave2 fan-out migration: the 5 legacy-parity read streams only (issues, accounts, contacts, users, messages); the full Pylon surface (teams, tags, custom fields, attachments, webhooks, etc.) is out of scope until Pass B. Pylon is read-only in legacy (Capabilities.Write is false) so no writes.json is shipped.

excluded.reason: no allow-listed reverse-ETL writes; Pylon connector is read-only
authenticated-user profile introspection, not a syncable object stream
